description_long: This lantern features a robust, square post supporting a lantern housing with a slightly tapered, pagoda-style roof. The lantern body is encased in vertical and horizontal metal bars, forming a grid pattern around translucent glass panels that likely diffuse the internal light. The glass appears to be a warm, yellowish color, suggesting a soft ambient glow when illuminated. The structure is predominantly metallic, with a matte, dark gray finish that gives it a modern yet utilitarian appearance. The design is simple and functional, with no visible decorative embellishments, making it suitable for urban parks, sidewalks, or residential pathways. The lantern is post-mounted, intended to be fixed into the ground for stable outdoor installation.
description: A post-mounted lantern with a dark metal frame, grid-patterned bars, and warm yellow glass panels under a pagoda-style roof. Its simple, modern design is ideal for urban outdoor lighting.
description_view_0: Front view shows the lantern's grid-patterned bars and the full width of the post and roof.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the same grid pattern, with the post and roof appearing slightly narrower.
description_view_2: Rear view is nearly identical to the front, showing the same grid and glass panel arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with consistent grid and post proportions.
